resources.string: At AI Chat, your privacy and security are our highest priorities. We are committed to protecting your personal information and ensuring a safe, transparent experience.\n\n
We may collect limited information such as device details, app usage analytics, and feedback submissions to improve performance and user experience.\n\n
Your data is used solely to enhance app functionality, maintain security, and improve AI responses.\n\n
We implement modern security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access or misuse.\n\n
Some services may rely on trusted third-party providers for analytics, cloud storage, or app functionality.\n\n
You may request deletion of your data or discontinue use of the service at any time.\n\n
This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically to reflect improvements and legal requirements.\n\n
By continuing to use AI Chat, you agree to this Privacy Policy.

Welcome to AI Chat.

These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your access to and use of the AI Chat mobile application, website, and related services (“Service”). By downloading, accessing, or using AI Chat, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these Terms.

If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, please discontinue use of the Service immediately.
AI Chat is intended to provide users with an intelligent and helpful AI-powered experience. By using the Service, you agree to use it responsibly, ethically, and lawfully.

You agree not to:

* Use the Service for unlawful, fraudulent, or malicious purposes.
* Attempt to exploit, disrupt, damage, or gain unauthorized access to the platform or its systems.
* Use the Service to distribute harmful, abusive, hateful, misleading, or offensive content.
* Upload or transmit viruses, malware, or harmful code.
* Interfere with the normal operation or security of the Service.

We reserve the right to investigate and take appropriate action against misuse of the platform.

AI Chat uses artificial intelligence to generate responses and suggestions based on user input.

While we strive to provide accurate and reliable information, AI-generated content may occasionally contain inaccuracies, incomplete information, or unintended results. Responses generated by the Service should be considered informational only and should not be treated as professional advice.

AI Chat does not guarantee the accuracy, reliability, or completeness of generated responses.

Users are solely responsible for how they use the information provided by AI Chat.

You acknowledge and agree that:

* Important information should always be independently verified.
* Decisions made based on AI-generated content are your own responsibility.
* The Service should not be relied upon for legal, financial, medical, or other professional advice without consulting qualified professionals.

By using the Service, you accept full responsibility for your actions and any outcomes resulting from the use of AI-generated content.

Your privacy is important to us.

AI Chat may collect limited information such as device information, app usage analytics, crash reports, and feedback submissions to improve the performance, stability, and quality of the Service.

We are committed to protecting your data and do not sell personal information to third parties.

By using the Service, you also agree to our Privacy Policy regarding the collection and use of information.

We continuously improve AI Chat to deliver a better experience.

As part of ongoing updates and maintenance, we may:

* Modify, update, or remove features.
* Temporarily suspend access for maintenance or technical issues.
* Introduce new functionality or premium features.
* Discontinue parts of the Service without prior notice.

We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation of the Service at all times.

All content, branding, logos, visual designs, interface elements, graphics, and software associated with AI Chat are the intellectual property of AI Chat and its licensors unless otherwise stated.

You may not:

* Copy, reproduce, distribute, or modify any part of the Service without permission.
* Reverse engineer or attempt to extract source code from the application.
* Use AI Chat branding or assets for unauthorized commercial purposes.


All rights not expressly granted are reserved.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, AI Chat and its developers shall not be held liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or special damages arising from:


* Use or inability to use the Service.
* Reliance on AI-generated responses.
* Errors, interruptions, or technical failures.
* Unauthorized access to data or systems.


Use of the Service is at your own risk.

We reserve the right to suspend, restrict, or terminate access to the Service at our sole discretion if:

* These Terms are violated.
* The platform is misused.
* Harmful, abusive, or illegal activities are detected.

Termination may occur without prior notice where necessary to protect the Service, users, or legal obligations.

We may update or revise these Terms periodically to reflect changes in the Service, legal requirements, or operational practices.

Updated Terms will become effective immediately upon posting within the application or associated platforms. Continued use of AI Chat after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
If you have any questions, concerns, or feedback regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us through the support or feedback section within the app.\n\n

By continuing to access or use AI Chat, you confirm that you understand and agree to these Terms of Service.

Thank you for using AI Chat.
